mapper.select:
select id, channel, name, start_time, end_time, description, type, discount, voucher, create_time, update_time from activity
and channel like conact('%',#{channel},'%')
and type like concat('%',#{type},'%')
/* > 是大于号 <是小于号 */ and start_time > now()
and start_time < now() and end_time > now()
and end_time < now()
